codeReview.summary: The fix correctly reuses the persisted dispatch attempt when composing the worktree-create idempotency key, and the added regression tests cover both fresh dispatch and blocked-resume parity without changing dispatch semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The audit-fix-worker skill still treats repo-wide lint as a mandatory finishing gate, but this feature transcript shows a legitimate pre-existing `.factory` formatting failure that the worker had to document and work around rather than fix in scope.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript for worker session 5dd53232-4b7b-495a-8173-9e70c2cd9d41 and handoff 2026-03-11T09-13-29-056Z__fresh-eyes-attempt-idempotency-fix__5dd53232-4b7b-495a-8173-9e70c2cd9d41.json record `bun run lint` failing only on `.factory/validation/execution-state-correctness-followup/scrutiny/synthesis.json`, while mission AGENTS.md forbids touching unrelated dirty hunks.

summary: Pass. The reviewed commit narrows the runtime change to a one-line idempotency fix in `worktree-tools.ts` and backs it with focused parity tests showing fresh dispatch and blocked resume now use the same persisted attempt value written by `DispatchCoordinator.dispatch()`.
